text: ↩resume rtsc H_006 real verdict: run 3D flat-band ED (src/ + cloud pod) to compute geometry (∫tr g) AND coupling Ω vs dimension together. Toy probe (state/h006_fs_dimension_scan_2026_06_24) showed dimension-EXTENSIVE geometry lever (⟨tr g⟩=0.25·d, ratio 3.0) → dimension-FRAME bypass not closed at toy level; real material verdict still pending. Card: HYPOTHESES/cards/H_006_fs_bound_dimension_invariance.md. Also worth carding: brainstorm seeds S5 (charge-spin-orbital fractionalization) + O2 (disorder-induced flat band).

↩resume +@ deepening (real-pending): trilayer A/C/B 4-lever stack (geometry + hBN-class connector C + electronic glue + 3D) is the MINIMAL ACHIEVABLE count (H_010 top-down); each lever's demand now material-reachable (glue 349meV sub-eV, H_007). Real verdicts done: H_006 3D lever 1.84x (fbgeom_3d.py), H_008 retarded-vertex bipolaron <g>_pair 4.27x>sp on summer pool. REMAINING real frontier: (1) DFT/DFPT trilayer A/hBN/B interface — does an ELECTRONIC glue pass an electron-opaque spacer? (H_009 L2, the dominant risk); (2) topology(B7)+fractionalization(S5) as un-modeled orthogonal levers. Cards H_003..H_010.

↩resume +@ REAL DFT frontier: closed-form +@ architecture is DEPLETED + self-consistent (H_003..H_011). Self-consistent trilayer = flat-band geometry layer A + hBN-class electron-opaque connector C + BOSONIC field-coupled glue layer B (exciton/plasmon, ~349meV, no competing order) + 3D lever. Minimal achievable 4-lever count (H_010). REMAINING (heavy, pool/DFT): (1) DFT+cRPA A/hBN/B trilayer — real cross-spacer exciton/plasmon coupling vs electron tunneling (H_011 L1) + does layer-A g survive the Coulomb field (H_011 L4); (2) competing-order check for the bosonic glue (H_004 L2 / H_011 L3); (3) topology B7 + fractionalization S5 as un-modeled orthogonal levers. Tools: src/fbgeom_3d.py, src/lane_a_explicit_phonon_bipolaron_ed.py (on summer pool).

↩resume +@ cRPA glue-transparency (the HARD half): H_015 real PBE+D3 DFT CONFIRMED the electron-opacity half — hBN suppresses interlayer e-coupling 7.7x, SATURATING at 1 monolayer (within H_011 window [0.44,2.85 ML]). REMAINING open half = does a BOSONIC field-coupled glue (exciton/plasmon ~349meV) cross the SAME hBN spacer? = cRPA/GW (RESPACK on summer QE-7.2 source-build, or GPU Yambo/BerkeleyGW on summer RTX5070). Also: H_016 showed competing-order escapable by frustration (eta*<0.45) but room-T AMPLITUDE axis still uncleared; H_018 caveat = predictor per-material scatter 1061x (room-T Tc = coordinate not prediction). summer has working pw.x 7.2 at ~/qe_build/q-e-qe-7.2/bin/.

↩resume +@ binding wall MOVED (research PR#7, state/research-crpa-glue-transparency-2026-06-25.md): cRPA GPU rental = NO-GO. H_011 field-transparency premise LITERATURE-CONFIRMED — out-of-plane hBN screening only eps_perp=3.29->3.6 (Laturia 2018, ~3-4x attenuation NOT exponential kill); interlayer Coulomb drag + exciton condensate MEASURED to ~2.5nm/~8ML hBN (arXiv:2508.09098), interlayer-plasmon SC computed (arXiv:2508.06195). So BOTH spacer halves now confirmed: electron-opaque (H_015 DFT) + field-transparent (literature). REMAINING binding wall = upstream MATERIALS existence: does a real flat-band metal A + competing-order-free ~349meV BOSONIC glue B exist with USEFUL Tc? = the excitonic-SC graveyard (Allender-Bray-Bardeen 1973 PRB7.1020 -> Miller-Strongin 1976 PRB13.4834 negative). Cheap next (b): /bin/zsh Keldysh/RPA-W proxy on summer (refine H_011 attenuation). No GPU needed.

↩resume 물질 돌파 — NAMED candidate wired into tool/rtsc_candidates.py (PR#11): CoSn(직접측정 QGT, 2412.17809) / hBN(2ML, H_015 DFT) / Ta2NiSe5(exciton ~349meV target, q=0 non-nesting -> no pre-empting CDW, SC under pressure, 2007.08212/2106.04396). Clears +@ box ON PAPER (bkt_Tc~137K@2D coord, ~252K w/ 3D lever) but JOINTLY UNREALIZED -> 🟠 CREDIBLE-PARTIAL, absorbed=false. Wall classified 🟠 MATERIALS-LIMITED (no no-go theorem, Krotov-Suslov 9912180; active frontier 2508.06195/2410.09148). NEXT to break 🟠->🟢: (1) real DFT/cRPA of the SPECIFIC CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 trio (now justified — named target, not blind); (2) competing-order + room-T-amplitude check on the trio; (3) keep filling tool/rtsc_candidates.py gaps each research round. rtsc_candidates is the LIVING tracker.

↩resume 🟢 LEAD PATH = demand-relaxation (H_023): clean Ta2NiSe5 (300meV, q=0, NO competing order) + modest N=2 multilayer D_s boost (f_mult≥1.164, ~16%) -> CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 reaches 299-356K room-T. 🟠-CONDITIONAL (is_green=False). SINGLE remaining unknown = real superfluid weight of a fabricated N=2 stack = DFT (converges with running H_019 per-layer DFT on summer). ALL 4 glue families now surveyed: exciton(Ta2NiSe5 300<349 short), plasmon(no turnkey ≥349 clean), 1T-TiSe2(400 but exciton=CDW inseparable), magnon(single ~252K wall, bimagnon tied to magnetic order). NEXT real compute: multilayer-D_s DFT of the N=2 CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 stack. Cards H_020-023.

↩resume +@ campaign at HONEST COMPUTATIONAL TERMINAL (synthesis: state/papers/plus-at-combination-campaign-synthesis.md, H_001-028). Strongest candidate = CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 🟠: geometry ∫tr g=2.856 DFT-confirmed, spacer DFT+lit, D_s(N=2) supported, glue Ta2NiSe5 ~300meV literature (many-body/beyond-PBE). Mechanism-space DRY (5 glue families + 3 A-metals CoSn/Ni3In/CsV3Sb5 + driven + demand-relaxation all surveyed). REMAINING is physical-only (NOT compute): (1) extreme-doping synthesis of CoSn to E_F; (2) trilayer fabrication; (3) accredited 4-probe transport+Meissner+H_c2/T_c = absorbed=true. summer QE now MPI (H_026). absorbed=false. To resume computation would need: GW/BSE for Ta2NiSe5 (redundant-lit), or a NEW flat-band metal with band AT E_F in PBE (none found yet), or N=2 stack DFT (lattice-mismatch intractable).
🔤 naming audit: 5 non-canonical 이름 — lane_2d_lattices_v2.py, harvest_final, harvest_final +2 (canonical-naming · git-rename in place)
